Off Calendar Aug-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
James Barnes appeared via zoom for and with Mary Novello (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding the increase of the bond, that the bond should be at $531,000.00, and that the Court shall seek clarification on getting an order for bond. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant as prayed.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported

Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Continued To Oct-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Barnes, for and with Mary Novello, Petitioner.

The court confirms that there are no appearances to object to the petition for Letters of Administration. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Mary C. Novello is appointed Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $25,000. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Sep-18-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

***After hearing (9/12/2022): The court advised at the hearing in this matter that bond would not be required. However, upon further consideration by the court, bond is fixed at $25,000.
